events.title: Ice Skating Holiday Hours
events.description:
Join us as we transform a corner of Camp North End into Camp North Pole for the holiday season with our annual ice skating rink! ❄️

Holiday Hours

Thanksgiving Break (Wed, Nov 26 – Sat, Nov 29): 11AM-10 PM daily
Winter Break (Wed, Dec 21 – Tue, Jan 2): 11AM-10 PM daily*

*Christmas Eve (Sun, Dec 24): 11AM-5 PM
*Christmas Day (Dec, 25): 11AM - 10PM

General Admission: $18 per person

Children 5 and under: $15 per person

Skate rentals are included in the price and guests are welcome to use their skates at no discounted fee. All ticket sales will be walk-up only.

For all FAQ’s please click here. To inquire about group rates or private rink rentals, please email iceskating@camp.nc ( mailto:iceskating@camp.nc )

events.description:

Be sure to note The Bulb's NEWEST MARKET LOCATION at Camp North End!





Thursdays from 11am - 12pm
400 Camp Rd. (Ford Factory) 🌻
North End Community Coalition's space, "The Nest"

events.title: Stranger Things TV Trivia
events.description:
TV dinner trivia is baaaAAaaacccck on January 7th at 6 p.m. with Stranger Things edition. Brush off your hellfire club T-shirt and get ready to see if you rule or if you suck. We’re doing seasons 1-3 this round. We’ll do seasons 4-5 next month! Registration is live here. ( https://pci.jotform.com/form/253615870425156?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQMMjU2MjgxMDQwNTU4AAGndf0ZjC7XYztLZ5NX04a8XJ3e1D0F60xVmRLfykW3mQkI6KZf5NGsC-cKGG8_aem_WMn_aSA60EusvgLhs-x19w )

A few things to know before you go:
⚡️ There is a $5 registration fee to secure your spot. This is applied to your check at the end of the night or refunded to you so long as you cancel your spot at least 24 hours in advance of the start of trivia.
🍦We strongly recommend arriving early so you can get your food and drinks before we start the trivia portion.
🧙♂️Teams are capped at 6 people max. Registration is required. If 6 p.m. fills up, we will open up an 8 p.m. option!

events.title: Writing Club at That’s Novel Books
events.description:
Join That's Novel Books Writing club from 5:30-7 p.m.!

Come hang with them and get some focused writing time in with others who are working on their own projects, be it journaling or novel writing. Here’s how it works:

✍️ From 5:30-6 we quietly right. Then we take a 5 minute break.
✍️ From 6:05-6:30 we quietly write again.
✍️ From 6:30-7 we share our writing (not mandatory), ask questions, get feedback, talk through some or our struggles/road blocks, and just hang!

events.title: Playing Card Scrapbook Making
events.description:
Hosted by Goodpostage ( https://www.instagram.com/goodpostage/ )

We are creating scrapbooks from a deck of 52 cards, bound with a small metal ring.
You can collage, use paint pens, markers, and write! Your cards can be manifestations for 2026, just a fun, creative exercise, a place to write your goals, or a structure for a scrapbook that you fill throughout the year. Anything you need!
We will provide the playing cards and rings for the event, its is $5 a person. Please bring any special paint, markers, supplies that you think you will need!

events.title: Survey Says Trivia
events.description:
Hosted by Canteen ( https://www.instagram.com/canteenclt/ )!
A delightful rendition of the classic Family Feud! Bid farewell to the mundane world of answering obscure questions and dive headfirst into a game that celebrates your gut instincts and intuitive prowess. No need to rack your brain for arcane facts; "Survey Says" brings you the joy of predicting what the masses think, channeling your inner mind-reader as you match wits against survey results. It's a game that's less about knowing it all and more about tapping into the collective consciousness. So, for those who find trivia a tad too taxing, our game promises laughter, camaraderie, and a chance to prove that sometimes, the wisdom of the crowd is the best path to victory!

events.title: Knight Vision Chess Club
events.description:
Join the Knight Vision Chess Club, where strategic minds converge and chess enthusiasts unite!


Sharpen your intellect and immerse yourself in the world of checkmates and endgames with our community. Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your journey on the 64 squares, Knight Vision Chess Club is the perfect place to foster your passion for the game. Join them for exciting matches, insightful discussions, and a supportive environment that celebrates the timeless allure of chess.









This is a free event but RSVP to reserve your spot! Join them at their next chess club gathering every third Thursday of the month at 6 pm at Loyd Studios, 120 Razades Wy suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28206. All experience levels and ages are welcome!

events.description:

 	Arrive between 9:30-10
 	Read from 10-11
 	Shop opens for the day at 11 a.m.

This event is free. Just come by and look for the other nerds holding books. Then you'll know you've found your people💛

events.description:
Join Good Postage for their monthly letter writing meet up!

We will meet at Free Range Bar, a couple doors down from the shop, Sunday, February 8th from 12-2pm.

Our letter writing meet up is intended to be a time to come together, celebrate and geek out over snail mail, write together, and enjoy a communal craft/jumping off point.

This month we are preparing for Valentine’s Day! We will be writing love letters to our ourselves :)

We will also have information at the meet up to write letters to your representatives. We are teaming up with our friends @voyageclt ( https://www.instagram.com/voyageclt/ ) to write and have our voices heard.

This is a free event, please bring all of your own supplies, or stock up at GP before!

See you Sunday!

events.description:
The Bulb provide mostly local produce, as well as health and wellness education, to food insecure neighborhoods. Since our launch in 2016, The Bulb has established community-led sponsorships and received grants that have allowed us to grow from 2 donation-based weekly markets to more than 12 in neighborhoods across the Charlotte metro area.

Be sure to note The Bulb's NEWEST MARKET LOCATION at Camp North End!





Thursdays from 11am - 12pm
400 Camp Rd. (Ford Factory) 🌻
North End Community Coalition's space, "The Nest"

events.title: Survey Says Trivia
events.description:
Hosted by Canteen ( https://www.instagram.com/canteenclt/ )!
A delightful rendition of the classic Family Feud! Bid farewell to the mundane world of answering obscure questions and dive headfirst into a game that celebrates your gut instincts and intuitive prowess. No need to rack your brain for arcane facts; "Survey Says" brings you the joy of predicting what the masses think, channeling your inner mind-reader as you match wits against survey results. It's a game that's less about knowing it all and more about tapping into the collective consciousness. So, for those who find trivia a tad too taxing, our game promises laughter, camaraderie, and a chance to prove that sometimes, the wisdom of the crowd is the best path to victory!

events.title: Knight Vision Chess Club
events.description:
Join the Knight Vision Chess Club, where strategic minds converge and chess enthusiasts unite!


Sharpen your intellect and immerse yourself in the world of checkmates and endgames with our community. Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your journey on the 64 squares, Knight Vision Chess Club is the perfect place to foster your passion for the game. Join them for exciting matches, insightful discussions, and a supportive environment that celebrates the timeless allure of chess.









This is a free event but RSVP to reserve your spot! Join them at their next chess club gathering every third Thursday of the month at 6 pm at Loyd Studios, 120 Razades Wy suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28206. All experience levels and ages are welcome!

events.title: That’s Novel Books Silent Book Club Brunch Edition
events.description:
The Sunday Brunch Silent Book Clubs will take place each month from 9:30-11 a.m.

The format is the same:

 	Arrive between 9:30-10
 	Read from 10-11
 	Shop opens for the day at 11 a.m.

Bring your chairs, bring your friends, bring your dogs but most importantly, bring your books in whatever format you’re reading. It’s that simple.

This event is free. Just come by and look for the other nerds holding books. Then you'll know you've found your people💛

events.title: Crossroad Cinema: Men in Black
events.description:
It's that time of year again... FREE outdoor movies are back at Camp North End! 🤩
Join us on Thursday nights as we rewind in time with some of the most iconic films. 🪐

Grab your friends, bring your chairs, and enjoy a fun night of movies under the stars + free retro arcade games. 🕹

Remember to pick up tasty food and drink from one of the many great Camp North End restaurants beforehand for the full dinner-and-a-show experience. 🤤🍽 (Please note that food/beverage from elsewhere is not permitted.)

THE LINEUP
JUNE
June 4th – Men in Black
June 11th – Jurassic Park
June 18th – Black Panther
June 25th – Mamma Mia!
JULY
July 2nd – The Sandlot
July 9th – Hamilton
July 16th – Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants
July 23rd – Iron Man
July 30th – The Lion King
AUGUST
August 6th – The Wizard of Oz
August 13th – Love & Basketball
August 20th – The Neverending Story
August 27th – The Emperor's New Groove

This is a FREE event and will take place outdoors rain or shine. . Movies start @ 8:30pm

Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your journey on the 64 squares, Knight Vision Chess Club is the perfect place to foster your passion for the game. Join them for exciting matches, insightful discussions, and a supportive environment that celebrates the timeless allure of chess.









This is a free event but RSVP to reserve your spot! Join them at their next chess club gathering every third Thursday of the month at 6 pm at Loyd Studios, 120 Razades Wy suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28206. All experience levels and ages are welcome!

events.title: Survey Says Trivia
events.description:
Hosted by Canteen ( https://www.instagram.com/canteenclt/ )!
A delightful rendition of the classic Family Feud! Bid farewell to the mundane world of answering obscure questions and dive headfirst into a game that celebrates your gut instincts and intuitive prowess. No need to rack your brain for arcane facts; "Survey Says" brings you the joy of predicting what the masses think, channeling your inner mind-reader as you match wits against survey results. It's a game that's less about knowing it all and more about tapping into the collective consciousness. So, for those who find trivia a tad too taxing, our game promises laughter, camaraderie, and a chance to prove that sometimes, the wisdom of the crowd is the best path to victory!

events.title: Survey Says Trivia
events.description:
Hosted by Canteen ( https://www.instagram.com/canteenclt/ )!
A delightful rendition of the classic Family Feud! Bid farewell to the mundane world of answering obscure questions and dive headfirst into a game that celebrates your gut instincts and intuitive prowess. No need to rack your brain for arcane facts; "Survey Says" brings you the joy of predicting what the masses think, channeling your inner mind-reader as you match wits against survey results. It's a game that's less about knowing it all and more about tapping into the collective consciousness. So, for those who find trivia a tad too taxing, our game promises laughter, camaraderie, and a chance to prove that sometimes, the wisdom of the crowd is the best path to victory!

events.title: Knight Vision Chess Club
events.description:
Join the Knight Vision Chess Club, where strategic minds converge and chess enthusiasts unite!


Sharpen your intellect and immerse yourself in the world of checkmates and endgames with our community. Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your journey on the 64 squares, Knight Vision Chess Club is the perfect place to foster your passion for the game. Join them for exciting matches, insightful discussions, and a supportive environment that celebrates the timeless allure of chess.









This is a free event but RSVP to reserve your spot! Join them at their next chess club gathering every third Thursday of the month at 6 pm at Loyd Studios, 120 Razades Wy suite 100, Charlotte, NC 28206. All experience levels and ages are welcome!

events.description:
The Sunday Brunch Silent Book Clubs will take place each month from 9:30-11 a.m.

The format is the same:

 	Arrive between 9:30-10
 	Read from 10-11
 	Shop opens for the day at 11 a.m.

Bring your chairs, bring your friends, bring your dogs but most importantly, bring your books in whatever format you’re reading. It’s that simple.

This event is free. Just come by and look for the other nerds holding books. Then you'll know you've found your people💛
